Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 132 

LINE_COPAY_AMT 

LABEL: Line Beneficiary Copayment Amount 

DESCRIPTION: The copayment amount paid by an enrollee for the service, which does not include the amount paid 
by the insurance company. 

SHORT NAME: LINE_COPAY_AMT 

LONG NAME: LINE_COPAY_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): OT line 
RX line 

VALUES: Dollar amount with two
